caseSummary.passCriteria: No reconnect chaos regression; stress suite must pass end-to-end.
positiveMatches: stress simulates room churn without duplicates or presence drift

caseSummary.passCriteria: No duplicate listener drift or leak regressions; chaos suite must pass.
positiveMatches: same user joining from two controllers remains deduped

positiveMatches: ignores stale host claims after migration to a new host

caseSummary.passCriteria: Mic grants, revokes, and slot limits stay aligned under pressure.
Late-join hydration and UI authority sync must pass.
Health alerts and suppression model must match deterministic telemetry tests.
Fresh production web build succeeds after room gate execution.
